items.quote: He's got nasty power in his hands

items.claim: Steve Erceg is a very well-rounded fighter.
items.quote: crafty Steve Ersg, who we know is very well-rounded.

items.claim: Islam Dulatav is a super explosive striker and a fast starter.
items.quote: super explosive striker. We haven't seen him in a little while. This guy's a fast starter, very dangerous on the feet

items.claim: Abdul Hussein is small for the 135-pound weight class at 5 feet 5 inches tall.
items.quote: this guy is small for this weight class. He's only 5'5

items.claim: Abdul Hussein covers distance well and uses light, karate-taekwondo-esque footwork.
items.quote: he makes up for that by covering distance very well. He's very springy in his stance... Kind of karate taekwond doesque with the light footwork.

items.claim: Abdul Hussein possesses dangerous submission skills and strong ground and pound.
items.quote: He's got nasty submission skills as well... Not only can he control you and beat you up with some nasty ground and pound, he is a very opportunist opportunistic submission guy

items.claim: Abdul Hussein's most recent victory was a violent finish over Tyson Nam 6 months ago.
items.quote: His most recent victory 6 months ago was against a former UFC guy in Tyson Nam to where he violently uh put him away.

items.claim: Abdul Hussein had a competitive fight and successfully took down Muhammad Mokaev in the past.
items.quote: even though Hussein lost that fight, it was rather competitive at at moments, right? We saw Abdul taking down Muhammad Makay.
